releases.author: Sporarum
releases.description:
Initial release, allows:
* Creating calendars in the style of Simone Giertz's Every Day Calendar
* Configuring the colors through CSS
* Calendar-level customization through CSS class selectors and `additionalClasses` parameter
releases.name: Version 1.0.0
